title: citharexylum spinosum f. subserratum
intro: Citharexylum spinosum f. subserratum, also known as the Texas sage, is a shrub-like plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions such as wounds, fever, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Citharexylum spinosum f. subserratum include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be obtained through proper identification and processing under the guidance of a medical professional.
